item.description: United States Central Command released video of its 10th night of consecutive strikes flying deep into Iran, targeting command centers, launch sites and air defenses. President Donald Trump says Iran “will pay” anytime they kill an American servicemember. Meanwhile, the State Department issued a rare global travel warning to Americans abroad after Iran sent another barrage of missiles into Jordan. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US Carries out 10th Night of Strikes After Service Members Killed
media:content.media:description: United States Central Command released video of its 10th night of consecutive strikes flying deep into Iran, targeting command centers, launch sites and air defenses. President Donald Trump says Iran “will pay” anytime they kill an American servicemember. Meanwhile, the State Department issued a rare global travel warning to Americans abroad after Iran sent another barrage of missiles into Jordan. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

item.title: US Carries out 10th Night of Strikes After Service Members Killed

item.description: Microdramas made specifically for phones have become a huge sensation in China and are finding fans in the United States. As China’s short series go global, artificial intelligence is transforming not just how their stories are told but how entertainment itself is made. NBC’s Janis Mackey Frayer reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: How AI is Transforming the Way China’s Microdramas Are Made
media:content.media:description: Microdramas made specifically for phones have become a huge sensation in China and are finding fans in the United States. As China’s short series go global, artificial intelligence is transforming not just how their stories are told but how entertainment itself is made. NBC’s Janis Mackey Frayer reports for TODAY.

item.title: How AI is Transforming the Way China’s Microdramas Are Made

item.description: President Donald Trump has announced a new 50% tariff on most Canadian goods, accusing the country of discriminating against American-made products. Meantime, the White House says the new Air Force One, gifted by Qatar, will be sent away for upgrades, raising new questions about how safe it is for the president. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Trump Targets Canada With 50% Tariff Citing Trade Discrimination
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump has announced a new 50% tariff on most Canadian goods, accusing the country of discriminating against American-made products. Meantime, the White House says the new Air Force One, gifted by Qatar, will be sent away for upgrades, raising new questions about how safe it is for the president. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

item.title: Trump Targets Canada With 50% Tariff Citing Trade Discrimination

item.description: Andy Burnham was formally appointed the newest British prime minster, the seventh to take up the position in the last decade. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports on how Burnham differs from outgoing prime minster Keir Starmer and his meeting with King Charles III.

media:content.media:title: Andy Burnham formally appointed U.K. prime minster
media:content.media:description: Andy Burnham was formally appointed the newest British prime minster, the seventh to take up the position in the last decade. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports on how Burnham differs from outgoing prime minster Keir Starmer and his meeting with King Charles III.

item.title: Andy Burnham formally appointed U.K. prime minster

item.dc:creator: Jeremy Mikula
Ashley Mowreader
item.description: President Donald Trump makes a call to FIFA, Scotland fans make an impression, and an upset results in a national holiday.

media:content.media:text: Photo grid of obscured images

item.title: Spain’s supremacy, Messi and Mbappé’s race for greatness, and a freak injury: World Cup quiz

item.description: Novo Dordisk, which makes Ozempic and Wegovy, has filed a federal lawsuit against Eli Lilly, accusing its competitor of false advertising and unfair competition. Novo Nordisk challenges national ad campaigns from Eli Lilly that compare GLP-1 drugs from both companies, saying that Lilly intentionally relies on outdated clinical trials to paint a false and misleading picture. NBC’s Christine Romans joins TODAY with the details.

media:content.media:title: Novo Nordisk Sues Eli Lilly Over Weight Loss Drug Advertisement
media:content.media:description: Novo Dordisk, which makes Ozempic and Wegovy, has filed a federal lawsuit against Eli Lilly, accusing its competitor of false advertising and unfair competition. Novo Nordisk challenges national ad campaigns from Eli Lilly that compare GLP-1 drugs from both companies, saying that Lilly intentionally relies on outdated clinical trials to paint a false and misleading picture. NBC’s Christine Romans joins TODAY with the details.

item.title: Novo Nordisk Sues Eli Lilly Over Weight Loss Drug Advertisement

item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Chuck
item.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.

media:content.media:text: Woman in a blue patient uniform gown sits alone on a bed in a private room and looking out the window in hospital, expressing her concern about the results of an examination. Sad patient and thinking stress anxiety with symptoms of depression and sadness,

item.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you

item.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

media:content.media:title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
media:content.media:description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

item.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada

item.dc:creator: Jeremy Mikula
Ashley Mowreader
item.description: President Donald Trump makes a call to FIFA, Scotland fans make an impression, and an upset results in a national holiday.

media:content.media:text: Photo grid of obscured images

item.title: Spain’s supremacy, Messi and Mbappé’s race for greatness, and a freak injury: World Cup quiz

item.dc:creator: Andrew Blankstein
Dennis Romero
item.description: Joseph and Phoenix Henrichsen were charged with kidnapping a federal employee. “I’ve taken two fed biologists hostage,” the father is accused of saying in a voicemail.

media:content.media:credit: U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of California
media:content.media:text: The camping trailer inhabited by Joseph and Phoenix Henrichsen, parked on a road near Gumboot Lake Campground in California.
media:content.media:description: The camping trailer inhabited by Joseph and Phoenix Henrichsen parked on a road near Gumboot Lake Campground in California.

item.title: Father, son charged with kidnapping 2 U.S. Forest Service biologists at gunpoint

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: I talked with laundry experts to learn how often you should change ans wash your towels and when it’s best to throw them away in exchange for new ones.

media:content.media:text: Towels have a tendency to develop mildew and odors, which is why it’s important to clean them thoroughly.
media:content.media:description: Towels have a tendency to develop mildew and odors, which is why it’s important to clean them thoroughly.

media:content.media:text: Towels have a tendency to develop mildew and odors, which is why it’s important to clean them thoroughly.
media:content.media:description: Towels have a tendency to develop mildew and odors, which is why it’s important to clean them thoroughly.

item.title: Here’s how often you should change your towels, and when to throw them away, according to experts

item.dc:creator: Mili Godio
item.description: Think of exosomes as microscopic delivery trucks that help repair skin tissue, increase collagen and more. I spoke to dermatologists about what exosomes do and how to safely use them.

media:content.media:text: Exosome serums are popping up in popular skin care brands more and more. Whether they’re actually effective depends on how you use them.
media:content.media:description: Exosome serums are popping up in popular skin care brands more and more. Whether they’re actually effective depends on how you use them.

media:content.media:text: Exosome serums are popping up in popular skin care brands more and more. Whether they’re actually effective depends on how you use them.
media:content.media:description: Exosome serums are popping up in popular skin care brands more and more. Whether they’re actually effective depends on how you use them.

item.title: Everyone is talking about exosomes in skin care — here’s why

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Vets say getting rid of fleas involves three steps: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning. Here’s how to complete each one and products to use.

media:content.media:text: It’s ideal to prevent fleas in the first place, but if you’re dealing with an infestation, there are three important steps to follow: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning.
media:content.media:description: It’s ideal to prevent fleas in the first place, but if you’re dealing with an infestation, there are three important steps to follow: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning.

media:content.media:text: It’s ideal to prevent fleas in the first place, but if you’re dealing with an infestation, there are three important steps to follow: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning.
media:content.media:description: It’s ideal to prevent fleas in the first place, but if you’re dealing with an infestation, there are three important steps to follow: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning.

item.title: Fleas are every pet parent’s worst nightmare – here’s how to get rid of them

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: The Oura Ring 5 is significantly smaller and slimmer than previous versions. But is it worth the upgrade? I tested it for over a month to find out.

media:content.media:text: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

media:content.media:text: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

media:content.media:text: A close up of the Oura Ring 5 and Oura Ring 4 in a person’s hand.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

media:content.media:text: A picture of the writer’s sleep data taken from the Oura Ring 5 compared to data from the Google Fitbit Air.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

media:content.media:text: A video of the symptoms radar feature on the Oura app.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

media:content.media:text: A picture of the writer’s cycling data taken from the Oura Ring 5, comparing a manually logged workout and an automatically detected one.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

item.title: Is the Oura Ring 5 worth it?

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Shabad
Frank Thorp V
item.description: President Donald Trump said he had given his “complete and total endorsement” to Graham, who was appointed to finish her late brother’s Senate term.

media:content.media:text: U.S. Sen. Darline Graham Nordone participates in a ceremonial swearing-in in the Old Senate Chamber at the U.S. Capitol.
media:content.media:description: Sen. Darline Graham, R-S.C., said she will run for a full six-year term to replace her brother, the late Sen. Lindsey Graham.

item.title: Sen. Darline Graham says she’s running for a full 6-year term after Trump urged her to jump into the race

item.dc:creator: Andrew Blankstein
Dennis Romero
item.description: Joseph and Phoenix Henrichsen were charged with kidnapping a federal employee. “I’ve taken two fed biologists hostage,” the father is accused of saying in a voicemail.

item.title: Father, son charged with kidnapping 2 U.S. Forest Service biologists at gunpoint

item.dc:creator: Aaron Gilchrist
Rebecca Cohen
item.description: Friends and family members remembered the 18-year-old as a “gentle, calming spirit” and a model for his younger siblings.

media:content.media:text: Christine Wonsley,Elmore Wonsley,Elmore Wonsley Jr. Ethan Wonsley
media:content.media:description: Christine Wonsley cries next to her Husband Elmore, and their sons Elmore Jr. and Ethan, during a memorial service for her son Nolan Xavier Wells on Monday, July 20, 2026, in Ocean Springs, Miss.

media:content.media:text: Christine Wonsley,Elmore Wonsley,Ben Crump,Al Sharpton
media:content.media:description: Christine Wonsley, center, is flanked by her husband, Elmore, second from left; attorney Ben Crump, left; and the Rev. Al Sharpton at the memorial service.

media:content.media:text: Nolan Wells Funeral
media:content.media:description: Football teammates at the memorial service.

media:content.media:text: Nolan Wells with his coach, Jake Bramlett.
media:content.media:description: Nolan Wells with his coach, Jake Bramlett.

media:content.media:text: Nolan Wells with his parents.
media:content.media:description: Nolan Wells with his parents.

item.title: Calls for justice intensify at Nolan Wells’ funeral
